name: Mike Johnson
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,110,639 for Mike Johnson in U.S. House, LA-04. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
